name: Melina - Your trusty steed
description:
"I will gift you Torrent, the spectral steed... Wait... Where did I put the whistle..."

You made an accord with Melina, she'll be your maiden and blah blah. The same story as always. Everything's the usual until she decides to give you Torrent. For some reason, she doesn't have the whistle with herself. How can you even lose something so important? Or maybe someone stole it? Whatever, you're gonna need a steed, so if she doesn't have torrent someone will have to play the role of horse.

Never a bad time for an Elden Ring bot. A funny one this time.

Sorry about the absolute dogshit censoring. I tried and tried, this is the best I could do without the retarded dog showing up (yes I had to censor even the face). Still I'm gonna try and find another way to censor it properly, wish me luck. As compensation, the uncensored image is on the first message.

Update: Apologies for the drama, it was my mistake, kinda. Turned out the main problem with the censoring were Melina's eyes, don't ask because I have no idea what the filter saw in them. As you can see all's good now.

Art by zedintruder. I really like this artist, one of my favorites.
